# bad design-audit GitHub Action

Run a vision-powered design audit on any URL and post the results as a PR comment, with optional auto-fix via the evolve loop.

## Usage

### Basic — audit a Vercel preview URL

```yaml
name: Design Audit
on: pull_request
jobs:
  audit:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Wait for Vercel preview
        id: vercel
        uses: zentered/vercel-preview-url@v1
      - name: Run design audit
        uses: tangle-network/browser-agent-driver/.github/actions/design-audit@main
        with:
          url: https://${{ steps.vercel.outputs.preview_url }}
          openai-api-key: ${{ secrets.OPENAI_API_KEY }}
```

### Multi-page crawl with score gate

```yaml
- uses: tangle-network/browser-agent-driver/.github/actions/design-audit@main
  with:
    url: ${{ steps.deploy.outputs.preview_url }}
    pages: 5
    fail-on-score-below: '6.5'
    fail-on-critical: 'true'
    openai-api-key: ${{ secrets.OPENAI_API_KEY }}
```

### Auto-fix via the evolve loop

```yaml
- uses: tangle-network/browser-agent-driver/.github/actions/design-audit@main
  with:
    url: ${{ steps.deploy.outputs.preview_url }}
    evolve: claude-code
    openai-api-key: ${{ secrets.OPENAI_API_KEY }}
- name: Open auto-fix PR
  if: success()
  run: gh pr create --title "auto: design audit fixes" --body "Generated by bad design audit"
```

## Inputs

| Input | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `url` | yes | — | URL to audit (typically a preview URL) |
| `profile` | no | (auto-classify) | `general`, `saas`, `marketing`, `defi`, `vibecoded` |
| `pages` | no | `3` | Maximum pages to crawl |
| `fail-on-score-below` | no | — | Fail action if score drops below threshold |
| `fail-on-critical` | no | `false` | Fail action if any critical findings exist |
| `comment-on-pr` | no | `true` | Post audit results as PR comment |
| `evolve` | no | — | `claude-code`, `codex`, `opencode`, or `css` |
| `bad-version` | no | `latest` | Version of `@tangle-network/browser-agent-driver` |
| `openai-api-key` | no | — | OpenAI key (or use `claude-code` provider) |
| `anthropic-api-key` | no | — | Anthropic key |

## Outputs

| Output | Description |
|---|---|
| `score` | Average design audit score (0-10) |
| `findings` | Total findings count |
| `critical` | Critical findings count |
| `report-path` | Path to `report.json` artifact |

## What gets posted

The PR comment includes:
- Overall score with a calibration bar
- Findings breakdown (critical/major/minor)
- **Top 5 fixes by ROI** with impact / effort / blast / CSS fix

The full audit (`report.json`, screenshots, evolve logs) is uploaded as a workflow artifact for 30 days.
